diagrams.title: MPLS Label Header Structure
diagrams.description: 32-bit MPLS shim header showing all fields and their bit positions
elements: Label Field (20 bits) - carries label value 0-1048575
BoS Bit (1 bit) - Bottom of Stack indicator
TTL Field (8 bits) - Time to Live
diagrams.purpose: Understanding MPLS packet format and field locations

diagrams.title: LSR Types and Packet Flow
diagrams.description: Network topology showing Ingress LER, Core LSRs, and Egress LER with packet flow arrows
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how packets flow through MPLS network and operation at each node

diagrams.title: LIB vs LFIB Architecture
diagrams.description: Control plane and Data plane separation in LSR architecture
elements: LIB in Control Plane (all label bindings)
LFIB in Data Plane (active forwarding entries)
diagrams.purpose: Understanding control and data plane separation in LSR

diagrams.title: Label Operations Visualization
diagrams.description: Three operations (PUSH, SWAP, POP) shown on sample packets
elements: Before/After PUSH: IP packet → Labeled packet
Before/After POP: Labeled packet → IP packet
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how each label operation transforms the packet
